name: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro XG 24
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro XG 24
short_description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro XG 24 is a professional-grade Layer 3 Etherlighting™ switch built to meet the demanding requirements of modern enterprise and data center environments.
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro XG 24 (USW-Pro-XG-24) is a professional-grade Layer 3 Etherlighting™ switch built to meet the demanding requirements of modern enterprise and data center environments. Featuring (16) 10 GbE ports, (8) 2.5 GbE ports, and (2) 25G SFP28 uplink ports, it provides exceptional versatility for connecting high-bandwidth servers, storage systems, and aggregation layers.

detailed_description.heading: Unmatched Performance
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro XG 24 (USW-Pro-XG-24) is a professional-grade Layer 3 Etherlighting™ switch built to meet the demanding requirements of modern enterprise and data center environments. Featuring (16) 10 GbE ports, (8) 2.5 GbE ports, and (2) 25G SFP28 uplink ports, it provides exceptional versatility for connecting high-bandwidth servers, storage systems, and aggregation layers. With a switching capacity of 460 Gbps and non-blocking throughput of 230 Gbps, this switch ensures ultra-fast, uninterrupted data flow across every port. The 342 Mpps forwarding rate and 8 MB packet buffer enable efficient packet handling, minimizing latency and packet loss even under heavy network loads. Supporting up to 1,000 VLANs and a MAC address table of 128,000 entries, the UniFi Switch Pro XG 24 allows fine-grained network segmentation and high-performance scalability. Engineered for performance, reliability, and future-ready connectivity, it is ideal for growing professional networks.

detailed_description.heading: Functional Design
detailed_description.text: The UniFi Switch Pro XG 24 introduces Etherlighting™ technology, a groundbreaking feature that visually indicates port location, link speed, and VLAN or network assignment through dynamic illumination. This feature makes troubleshooting and cable management effortless, especially in dark or densely packed rack environments. When paired with UniFi Etherlighting Patch Cables, the ports achieve optimal brightness and visibility, providing a clean, professional appearance. The switch also includes a 1.3-inch color LCM touchscreen display for quick status checks, device configuration, and live monitoring without external software. Built from high-grade SGCC steel, this 1U rack-mountable switch ensures structural integrity and durability, fitting securely into four-post racks with adjustable depths between 600 and 1,066 mm. With robust ESD protection up to ±30kV (air) and ±20kV (contact), the UniFi Switch Pro XG 24 is designed to perform reliably in any professional IT environment.

detailed_description.heading: Smart Management
detailed_description.text: The UniFi Switch Pro XG 24 is designed for redundant and efficient power delivery, featuring a 200W internal AC/DC power supply with a supported range of 100–240V AC at 50/60 Hz. It also supports UniFi Redundant Power System through a USP RPS DC input, enabling continuous operation even during power interruptions. With a maximum power consumption of just 150W, it delivers exceptional energy efficiency without sacrificing performance. Management is seamless through UniFi Network version 9.0.114 and later, allowing centralized configuration, monitoring, and firmware updates from a single intuitive interface. The switch fully supports Layer 3 networking, including static routing and inter-VLAN communication, enabling optimized data paths and reduced latency across complex infrastructures. With its powerful architecture and professional build quality, the UniFi Switch Pro XG 24 sets a new standard for enterprise-grade switching and reliability.

items.name: Power Method
items.value: AC/DC Adapter, USP RPS DC input
